title: Andreettaea exesilabia
taxonomy: Andreettaea exesilabia is classified within the family Asteraceae. This classification places Andreettaea exesilabia in the broader group of flowering plants, specifically within the order Asterales. The family Asteraceae is commonly referred to as the daisy or sunflower family due to its diverse range of species. This classification suggests a close relationship between Andreettaea exesilabia and other plants within the same family. Further classification may be available at the genus or species level.
